ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer (hashed) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the customer last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "finance_website" TEXT /* Finance website associated with the website */,
  "base_url" TEXT /* Base URL of the website */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the website is active */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the website was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the website was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_websites" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the website */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date the customer last visited the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_credits" (
  "store_credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store credit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who earned the store credit */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the store credit was earned */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the store credit */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the store credit expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the store credit (active, used, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_credits_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_credits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_points" (
  "reward_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward point */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who earned the reward point */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the reward point was earned */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of reward points */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the reward points expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reward points (active, used, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_points_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_points_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes provided by the customer during checkout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product after discounts */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for each item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the loyalty program started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the loyalty program ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loyalty program (active, upcoming, expired) */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for joining the loyalty program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)
